chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-4921 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on Misc. No.20555/2025 (Urgency) 2. For order on office objection Nos.5 and 29 3. For order on Misc. No.20556/2025 (Exemption) 4. For order on Misc. No.20557/2025 (Stay) 5. For hearing of main case 15.10.2025 Mr. Jahangeer Kalhoro advocate for the petitioner -------------------------------- 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2-5. Learned counsel for the petitioner under instructions does not press the instant petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed applications. However, he is at liberty to file a fresh petition, if so advised, for the relief which he actually seeks and which is available under the law. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
